title: Company
description: Learn more about Biogenix, our history, and mission.

faqs.question: What does Biogenix specialize in?
faqs.answer: Biogenix specializes in advanced healthcare diagnostics and laboratory equipment.

faqs.question: Where is Biogenix located?
faqs.answer: Our headquarters are in Pune, Maharashtra, India.

title: Equipment
description: Information about our equipment and usage.

faqs.question: What types of equipment are available?
faqs.answer: We provide Hematology Analyzers, IVD kits, Reagents, and more.

faqs.question: Do you provide maintenance?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer comprehensive maintenance and service contracts.

title: Delivery
description: Details about our delivery policies and logistics.

faqs.question: Do you provide same-day delivery?
faqs.answer: Same-day delivery is available in selected cities like Lucknow.

faqs.question: How are products shipped?
faqs.answer: Products are shipped via certified logistics partners ensuring safety and speed.
